title: ruellia humilis
intro: Ruellia humilis, also known as the Small Wild Petunia, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Ruellia humilis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
